languages.text: This grenade creates an area of sticky flammable material for 1 round. When any creature enters the area or is present in it at the moment it appears, it receives {uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} Oil charges. If a creature is in the area at the moment it disappears, it receives {uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} Oil charges. Each charge increases the fire damage taken by 1

traits.locale_text: This grenade creates an area of sticky flammable material for 1 round. When any creature enters the area or is present in it at the moment it appears, it receives {uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} Oil charges. If a creature is in the area at the moment it disappears, it receives {uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} Oil charges. Each charge increases the fire damage taken by 1

languages.text: This grenade creates an area of sticky flammable material, lasting for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Whenever a creature enters the area or is present inside it at the moment it appears, it suffers +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} stacks of {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}covered in oil{/g}. If a creature is in the area at the moment it disappears, it suffers +{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} stacks of {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}covered in oil{/g}. Each stack of this effect increases all fire or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} damage suffered by the creature by +1.

traits.locale_text: This grenade creates an area of sticky flammable material, lasting for 1 round. Whenever a creature enters the area or is present inside it at the moment it appears, it suffers +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} stacks of {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}}covered in oil{/g}. If a creature is in the area at the moment it disappears, it suffers {uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} stacks of {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}}covered in oil{/g}. Each stack of this effect increases all fire or burning damage suffered by the creature by +1.

This grenade creates an area of sticky flammable material, lasting for 1 round. Each stack of this effect increases all fire or burning damage suffered by the creature by +1.

languages.text: Эта граната создает область липкого горючего вещества на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}. Когда любое существо входит в эту область (или находится там в момент ее появления), оно получает +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} уровней эффекта {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}}в масле{/g}. Если существо находится в области в момент ее исчезновения, оно получает +{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} уровней эффекта {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}}в масле{/g}. За каждый уровень этого эффекта существо получает на +1 больше огненного урона и на +1 больше урона от {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}горения{/g}.
languages.original_text: This grenade creates an area of sticky flammable material, lasting for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Whenever a creature enters the area or is present inside it at the moment it appears, it suffers +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} stacks of {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}covered in oil{/g}. Each stack of this effect increases all fire or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} damage suffered by the creature by +1.

За каждый уровень этого эффекта существо получает на +1 больше огненного урона и на +1 больше урона от {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}горения{/g}.

languages.text: Diese Granate erzeugt 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang einen Bereich mit einem klebrigen brennbaren Material. Wenn eine Kreatur diesen Bereich betritt oder sich bei seiner Entstehung in ihm befindet, wird sie mit +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} Stapeln {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}Ölverschmiert{/g} belegt. Wenn eine Kreatur diesen Bereich betritt oder sich bei seiner Entstehung in ihm befindet, wird sie mit +{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} Stapeln {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}Ölverschmiert{/g} belegt. Jeder Stapel dieses Effektes erhöht alle Schäden durch Feuer oder {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Verbrennen{/g} der Kreatur um +1.
languages.original_text: This grenade creates an area of sticky flammable material, lasting for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Whenever a creature enters the area or is present inside it at the moment it appears, it suffers +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} stacks of {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}covered in oil{/g}. Each stack of this effect increases all fire or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} damage suffered by the creature by +1.

Wenn eine Kreatur diesen Bereich betritt oder sich bei seiner Entstehung in ihm befindet, wird sie mit +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} Stapeln {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}}Ölverschmiert{/g} belegt. Wenn eine Kreatur diesen Bereich betritt oder sich bei seiner Entstehung in ihm befindet, wird sie mit +{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} Stapeln {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}}Ölverschmiert{/g} belegt. Jeder Stapel dieses Effektes erhöht alle Schäden durch Feuer oder {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Verbrennen{/g} der Kreatur um +1.

languages.text: Esta granada crea una zona de material inflamable y pegajoso durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}. Cada vez que una criatura entra en la zona o se encuentra en ella en el momento de su aparición, recibe +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} acumulaciones de {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}capa de aceite{/g}. Si una criatura está en la zona en el momento de su desaparición, recibe +{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} acumulaciones de {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}capa de aceite{/g}. Cada acumulación de este efecto aumenta todo el daño de fuego y {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}quemadura{/g} que sufre la criatura en +1.
languages.original_text: This grenade creates an area of sticky flammable material, lasting for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Whenever a creature enters the area or is present inside it at the moment it appears, it suffers +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} stacks of {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}covered in oil{/g}. Each stack of this effect increases all fire or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} damage suffered by the creature by +1.

Cada vez que una criatura entra en la zona o se encuentra en ella en el momento de su aparición, recibe +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} acumulaciones de {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}}capa de aceite{/g}. Si una criatura está en la zona en el momento de su desaparición, recibe +{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} acumulaciones de {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}}capa de aceite{/g}. Cada acumulación de este efecto aumenta todo el daño de fuego y {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}quemadura{/g} que sufre la criatura en +1.

languages.text: Bu bomba, yapışkan ve yanıcı malzemeden 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} boyunca kalan bir alan oluşturur. Bir yaratık, bu alana girerse veya alan belirdiğinde onun içerisinde kalmışsa +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}yağla kaplı{/g} birikimine maruz kalır. Alan ortadan kalktığında alanın içinde olan bir yaratık, +{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}yağla kaplı{/g} birikimine maruz kalır. Bu etkinin her bir birikimi, yaratığın maruz kaldığı tüm ateş ve {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}yanma{/g} hasarını +1 artırır.
languages.original_text: This grenade creates an area of sticky flammable material, lasting for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Whenever a creature enters the area or is present inside it at the moment it appears, it suffers +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} stacks of {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}covered in oil{/g}. If a creature is in the area at the moment it disappears, it suffers +{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} stacks of {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}covered in oil{/g}. Each stack of this effect increases all fire or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} damage suffered by the creature by +1.

traits.locale_text: Bu bomba, yapışkan ve yanıcı malzemeden 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} boyunca kalan bir alan oluşturur. Bir yaratık, bu alana girerse veya alan belirdiğinde onun içerisinde kalmışsa +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}}yağla kaplı{/g} birikimine maruz kalır. Alan ortadan kalktığında alanın içinde olan bir yaratık, +{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}}yağla kaplı{/g} birikimine maruz kalır. Bu etkinin her bir birikimi, yaratığın maruz kaldığı tüm ateş ve {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}yanma{/g} hasarını +1 artırır.

languages.text: 手雷创造一片易燃的黏性区域，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。当生物进入或出现在该区域，该生物受到{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f}层{g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}油腻{/g}效果。若生物在消失时位于该区域，该生物受到{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f}层{g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}油腻{/g}效果。此效果每叠加一层，该生物受到的所有火焰伤害和{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃烧{/g}伤害提高1点。
languages.original_text: This grenade creates an area of sticky flammable material, lasting for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Whenever a creature enters the area or is present inside it at the moment it appears, it suffers +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} stacks of {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}covered in oil{/g}. If a creature is in the area at the moment it disappears, it suffers +{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} stacks of {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}covered in oil{/g}. Each stack of this effect increases all fire or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} damage suffered by the creature by +1.

traits.locale_text: 手雷创造一片易燃的黏性区域，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。当生物进入或出现在该区域，该生物受到{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f}层{g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}油腻{/g}效果。若生物在消失时位于该区域，该生物受到{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f}层{g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}油腻{/g}效果。此效果每叠加一层，该生物受到的所有火焰伤害和{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃烧{/g}伤害提高1点。

languages.text: Cette grenade crée une zone de matière inflammable collante qui dure 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Toute créature qui entre dans la zone ou s'y trouve au moment où elle apparaît subit +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} cumuls de {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}Couvert d'huile{/g}. Toute créature dans la zone au moment où elle disparaît subit +{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} cumuls de {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}Couvert d'huile{/g}. Chaque cumul de cet effet augmente les dégâts de feu ou de {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}combustion{/g} qui lui sont infligés de +1.
languages.original_text: This grenade creates an area of sticky flammable material, lasting for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Whenever a creature enters the area or is present inside it at the moment it appears, it suffers +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} stacks of {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}covered in oil{/g}. If a creature is in the area at the moment it disappears, it suffers +{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} stacks of {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}covered in oil{/g}. Each stack of this effect increases all fire or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} damage suffered by the creature by +1.

traits.locale_text: Cette grenade crée une zone de matière inflammable collante qui dure 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Toute créature qui entre dans la zone ou s'y trouve au moment où elle apparaît subit +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} cumuls de {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}}Couvert d'huile{/g}. Toute créature dans la zone au moment où elle disparaît subit +{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} cumuls de {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}}Couvert d'huile{/g}. Chaque cumul de cet effet augmente les dégâts de feu ou de {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}combustion{/g} qui lui sont infligés de +1.

languages.text: このグレネードは、1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}持続する粘着性の可燃物質の領域を生成する。クリーチャーがその領域に入るたびに、または領域が出現した瞬間にその中にいるたびに、{g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}油まみれ{/g}を+{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f}スタック受ける。領域が消滅する瞬間にその中にいるクリーチャーは、{g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}油まみれ{/g}を+{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f}スタック受ける。この効果のスタックごとに、クリーチャーが受けるすべての火炎または{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃焼{/g}ダメージが+1増加する。
languages.original_text: This grenade creates an area of sticky flammable material, lasting for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Whenever a creature enters the area or is present inside it at the moment it appears, it suffers +{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} stacks of {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}covered in oil{/g}. If a creature is in the area at the moment it disappears, it suffers +{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f} stacks of {g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}covered in oil{/g}. Each stack of this effect increases all fire or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} damage suffered by the creature by +1.

traits.locale_text: このグレネードは、1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}持続する粘着性の可燃物質の領域を生成する。クリーチャーがその領域に入るたびに、または領域が出現した瞬間にその中にいるたびに、{g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}油まみれ{/g}を+{uip|INTB+5|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f}スタック受ける。領域が消滅する瞬間にその中にいるクリーチャーは、{g|f:55f46da5facc4a7cb6a19166d7f2bd44}油まみれ{/g}を+{uip|INTB|c738632d62bd40d2ae1fdf8a79ee6d2f}スタック受ける。この効果のスタックごとに、クリーチャーが受けるすべての火炎または{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃焼{/g}ダメージが+1増加する。
